summary: Executed targeted backend pytest and frontend Playwright integration tests for encrypted provider key handling, scanner import normalization (text+JSON), invalid item skipping, report approval/export workflow, and page-load stability for Settings/Run Detail/Reports.
action_items: Optional hardening: move provider encryption key derivation to a dedicated secret env var (instead of deterministic MONGO_URL+DB_NAME derivation) for better key rotation and compromise isolation.
critical_code_review_comments: security_utils.py derives Fernet key from MONGO_URL and DB_NAME, which are operational config values rather than a dedicated cryptographic secret; this weakens compartmentalization and rotation strategy.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ targets/runs and temporary provider custom key during tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: One initial UI run failed because report controls are absent before report draft exists; rerun after generating report_draft confirmed approval/export controls, copy, and download actions work as expected.
rca of the issue: Initial selector failure RCA: run-detail report buttons are conditionally rendered only when bundle.report exists. Reproduction: create run -> do not generate report -> open Report tab -> no approval/export buttons. Mitigation for tests: trigger report_draft analysis before validating report controls.
